title: cephalomanes meifolium
intro: Cephalomanes meifolium, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cephalomanes meifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and treat various health conditions.
